pick_implementation.title: Pick Authentication Method
pick_implementation.description: Pick an authentication method to connect to your Panasonic MirAIe account.

auth.title: Link Panasonic MirAIe Account
auth.description: Click the link below to log in to your Panasonic MirAIe account and authorize Home Assistant.

oauth_discovery.title: Panasonic MirAIe Discovered
oauth_discovery.description: A Panasonic MirAIe device has been discovered. Click Submit to continue setup.

abort.already_configured: This Panasonic MirAIe account is already configured.
abort.missing_configuration: The Panasonic MirAIe integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation.
abort.oauth_implementation_unavailable: OAuth2 implementation is unavailable. Please restart Home Assistant.
abort.no_url_available: No external URL available. Please configure an external URL in your Home Assistant settings. [More info]({docs_url})
abort.oauth_timeout: Timeout while resolving the OAuth token.
abort.oauth_failed: Error while resolving the OAuth token.
abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress.
